---
project:
  type: website

website:
  title: "Analysis of Daily Balances"
  subtitle: "Using routine data to visualize daily balances and 15-day rolling balances"
  navbar:
    logo: Images/emblem_giz_large.png

format: 
  html:
    include-before-body:
      text: |
        <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
          <img src="Images/emblem_giz_large.png" width="400">
        </div>
    theme: cosmo
  
author:
  - name: "Joseph Lara"
    affiliation: "GIZ-GPE"
  
date: today
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---


```{r load-dependencies}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(janitor)
library(slider)
library(scales)
library(plotly)
library(htmlwidgets)
```

```{r}
path_source <- "~/Data/esistafe/relatoriofase2025/251215-FluxoFundosReconciliação FASE.xlsx"
```


```{r}
df <- read_excel(path_source,
sheet = "cut MTS 2025",
range = "b4:k2075"
) |> 
    clean_names()
```


```{r}
df1 <- df %>%
  mutate(
    origem = case_when(
      !is.na(debito_mt) & debito_mt != 0 ~ "Debito",
      !is.na(credito) & credito != 0 ~ "Credito",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    debito_credito = case_when(
      origem == "Debito"  ~ debito_mt,
      origem == "Credito" ~ credito * -1,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
    

```



```{r}
# 1) Daily values on days that exist in the source
daily_base <- df1 %>%
  mutate(data = as.Date(data)) %>%
  arrange(data) %>%
  group_by(data) %>%
  summarise(
    saldo_mt  = dplyr::last(saldo_mt[!is.na(saldo_mt)]),
    saldo_usd = dplyr::last(saldo_usd[!is.na(saldo_usd)]),
    cambio3   = dplyr::last(cambio3[!is.na(cambio3)]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  as_tibble()

# 2) Skeleton of all days in 2025
calendar_2025 <- tibble(
  data = seq.Date(as.Date("2025-01-01"), as.Date("2025-12-31"), by = "day")
)

# 3) Join + carry forward
daily_2025 <- calendar_2025 %>%
  left_join(daily_base, by = "data") %>%
  arrange(data) %>%
  fill(saldo_mt, saldo_usd, cambio3, .direction = "down") |> 
    arrange(data) %>%
  mutate(
    saldo_mt_roll15 = slide_dbl(
      saldo_mt,
      mean,
      .before = 14,   # previous 14 days + today = 15 days
      .complete = TRUE
    )
  )
```


```{r}
p <- daily_2025 %>%
  arrange(data) %>%
  mutate(
    saldo_m = saldo_mt / 1e6,
    mm15_m  = saldo_mt_roll15 / 1e6
  ) %>%
  plot_ly(x = ~data) %>%
  add_lines(
    y = ~saldo_m,
    name = "Saldo Diário",
    line = list(color = "#F8766D"),
    hovertemplate = paste(
      "Saldo Diário: %{y:,.2f} milhões MT",
      "<extra></extra>"
    )
  ) %>%
  add_lines(
    y = ~mm15_m,
    name = "Média Móvel 15 Dias",
    line = list(color = "#00BFC4"),
    hovertemplate = paste(
      "Média Móvel: %{y:,.2f} milhões MT",
      "<extra></extra>"
    )
  ) %>%
  layout(
    title = list(text = "Saldo MT e Média Móvel (15 dias) - 2025"),
    xaxis = list(
      title = "Mês",
      tickformat = "%b",        # show months on axis
      dtick = "M1",
      tickangle = -45,
      hoverformat = "%Y-%m-%d"  # show full date in unified hover header
    ),
    yaxis = list(
      title = "Saldo (milhões MT)",
      zeroline = FALSE
    ),
    hovermode = "x unified",
    legend = list(
      orientation = "v",
      x = 1.02,
      y = 0.5,
      xanchor = "left",
      yanchor = "middle"
    ),
    margin = list(r = 150)
  )


p
```


```{r}
# Save plot
htmlwidgets::saveWidget(
  p,
  file = "Graphics/saldo_mt_2025_interactive.html",
  selfcontained = TRUE
)
```
